stimulus:
Welcome! In this study, you will play three short video games, completing a short survey after each game.

Please make sure you are in a quiet environment where you can focus for the duration of the study. Some games may use sound, so please ensure that your device's volume is not muted.

Press any key to begin.
Press any key to proceed to the first video game. Should you encounter a game-breaking bug, please report the issue in the Menu tab to the right of the screen.

response: {"creativity-rating":4,"creativity-free-response":"it was creative because i had a sense of freedom where i would put my blocks to move the balls and where to mix my balls for the right colour","originality-rating":3,"originality-free-response":"it had old 2d vibes and it was looking unique of the patterns and the concept","effectiveness-rating":3,"effectiveness-free-response":"it was nice playing it but it was a bit frustrating without help to figure it out.","authenticity-rating":3,"attention-check":3,"intentionality-rating":4,"authenticity-intentionality-free-response":"it was looking unique of the playstyle especially the concept of drawing wherever i wanted so it was authentic and you could tell there was personal effort for it to become playable"}
